data.title: Rongcheng Group Limited Announces Entering into an Agreement and Plan of Merger with GalaxyEdge Acquisition Corporation
data.description: On May 01, 2026, Rongcheng Group Limited, a Cayman Islands company, disclosed its merger agreement with GalaxyEdge Acquisition Corporation (NYSE: GLED, GLEDR, GLEDU). The deal involves Rongcheng merging with GalaxyEdge's subsidiary, the Purchaser, and GalaxyEdge merging with the Purchaser, becoming a publicly traded entity. The agreement outlines the Merger Sub's incorporation with Rongcheng and GalaxyEdge entities, resulting in Rongcheng becoming a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Purchaser.

data.title: SHIB faces $0.0000085 test in 14 days; RSI at 59.71. Volume crucial for momentum. Risk of drop to $0.000007 support.
data.description: The cryptocurrency SHIB is currently experiencing uncertainty in trading, as its Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 59.71, indicating a neutral position. The trading volume is low, suggesting a lack of strong momentum. There is a crucial two-week period ahead for SHIB, during which it must surpass the resistance level of $0.0000085. Failure to do so could result in a decline towards the support level of $0.000007.

data.title: TON coin at $1.35 shows potential for a 60% surge to $2.20-$2.40 with resistance at $1.40. Mixed signals but bullish.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Toncoin is currently being traded at $1.35, showing technical momentum close to resistance levels. Institutional positioning indicates a 60% chance of a potential breakout, with a forecasted target range of $2.20 to $2.40 in the coming weeks.

data.title: XAI Octagon Floating Rate & Alternative Income Trust Declares its Monthly Common Shares Distribution of $0.225 per Share
data.description: On May 1, 2026, the XAI Octagon Floating Rate & Alternative Income Trust announced a monthly distribution of $0.225 per share on its common shares (NYSE: XFLT). This distribution will be paid on June 1, 2026, to common shareholders who are recorded as such by May 15, 2026. The distribution amount remains consistent with the previous month's payment of $0.225 per share.

data.title: Ready Capital Corporation Announces First Quarter 2026 Results and Webcast Call
data.description: On May 1, 2026, Ready Capital Corporation (NYSE: RC) shared plans to unveil its Q1 2026 financial results post the New York Stock Exchange shutdown on May 7, 2026. The management will conduct a webcast and conference call on May 8, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to review the financial outcomes for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026, along with giving an overall business update.

data.title: GECC plans to announce Q1 2026 earnings and hold a conference call. Stay updated with the latest financial results.
data.description: A recent report revealed that the average global temperature has increased by 1.1 degrees Celsius above pre-industrial levels. This rise is dangerously close to the threshold set by the Paris Agreement to prevent catastrophic climate change. The report also highlighted that carbon dioxide levels in the atmosphere have reached 415 parts per million, the highest in human history. Scientists warn that urgent action is needed to curb emissions and limit global warming to avoid irreversible damage to the planet.

data.title: Farmer Brothers Stockholders Vote to Approve Proposed Acquisition by Royal Cup
data.description: Today, Farmer Brothers shared that their stockholders have given the green light for the planned takeover by Royal Cup. The decision was made during a special meeting on May 1.

data.title: Credicorp Ltd.: Credicorp’s Earnings Release and Conference Call 1Q26
data.description: On May 1, 2026, Credicorp Ltd, based in Lima, Peru, revealed that the company will release its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, May 14, 2026, post the market's closure. This update was shared with shareholders and the market.

data.title: Skycorp Solar Group Limited Announces Acquisition of Remaining 56% Stake in Nanjing Cesun Power Co., Ltd. and $3.0 Million Private Placement
data.description: In Ningbo, China, on May 01, 2026, Skycorp Solar Group Limited (NASDAQ: PN), a provider of solar PV products specializing in solar cables and connectors, disclosed the completion of a Share Acquisition Agreement on April 30, 2026. This agreement entails the procurement of the remaining 56% equity stake in Nanjing Cesun Power Co., Ltd. Furthermore, Skycorp confirmed the finalization of Securities Purchase Agreements with three distinct institutional investors to secure a total of USD 3,000,000 through a private placement (PIPE) transaction.

data.title: XAI Madison Equity Premium Income Fund Declares its Monthly Distribution of $0.060 per Share
data.description: Chicago-based XAI Madison Equity Premium Income Fund (the “Fund”) has announced its standard monthly distribution of $0.060 for each common share (NYSE: MCN). The distribution will be paid on June 1, 2026, to common shareholders who are recorded as of May 15, 2026. This distribution remains consistent with the previous month's payout of $0.060 per share.

data.title: DOGE may correct to $0.09 from overbought levels (RSI 73), before potentially reaching $0.16. Opportunity for accumulation.
data.description: With DOGE's Relative Strength Index currently at 73 and bearish funding dynamics in play, analysts are predicting a 20% pullback for the cryptocurrency. This drop could see DOGE reaching a support level of $0.09 in the coming days, providing an opportunity for accumulation before a potential rebound towards the $0.16 resistance level.

data.title: Solana's current price at $83.95 hints at a potential breakout target of $150, given mixed signals and a 75.1% long bias.
data.description: Solana is currently trading at $83.95, indicating conflicting signals in the market. Whales have a significant 75.1% long bias, but retail sentiment leans bearish. Technical indicators hint at an upcoming pivotal movement that could lead the price to reach $150.

data.title: ADA price could hover around $0.28 before a possible 32% rise to $0.33 within 30 days, backed by a 68% long bias.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ADA is currently trading in a narrow range at $0.25, showing neutral momentum. However, analysis of smart money positioning indicates a 68% inclination towards long positions. This could potentially lead to a breakout towards $0.33 within the next 30 days, contingent upon confirmation by trading volume.

data.title: XRP's $1.37 at crossroads amid institutional deadlock, poised for $2.20 surge or $1.20 drop as indicators align.
data.description: The current price of XRP stands at $1.37, signifying a period of heightened uncertainty among institutional investors. Technical indicators are pointing towards a forthcoming significant shift, which could potentially push the asset to exceed $2.20 or initiate a decline.

data.title: RAD Amplify Hires Tom Costello as Director of Sales
data.description: RAD Amplify, an AI-driven audience insight and creator advertising company, has appointed Tom Costello as its Director of Sales in New York. With over 15 years of experience in digital advertising sales, Costello will spearhead revenue growth and foster collaborations with brands and agencies, further solidifying RAD Amplify's presence in the industry. The company's focus on Fortune 1000 brands and agencies highlights its commitment to expanding market reach. Costello's expertise positions RAD Amplify for continued success.

data.title: Registered Apprenticeships yet to take off
data.description: The current administration is heavily investing in Registered Apprenticeships to tackle the shortage of skilled workers in the country. However, the results of this initiative are still pending and its success is uncertain.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Iran Makes Hormuz Offer; Apple, Amazon, Google Lead Earnings
data.description: The stock market is currently reaching record highs, with a focus on key financial results and spending patterns of major companies such as Apple, Amazon, and Google. Talks with Iran have been abruptly canceled. This development comes amidst news that Iran has made an offer pertaining to the Hormuz Strait. Additionally, market attention is on notable earnings reports from leading companies like Apple, Amazon, and Google.

data.title: VVT Med Signs Largest European Distribution Agreement to Date; Distributor Joins as Investor
data.description: An agreement has been reached for a five-year commitment involving minimum purchase commitments totaling around CAD $2.3 million. As part of this, a distributor has also decided to become an investor in the company's ongoing private placement.

data.title: RBC Bearings to Webcast Fourth Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Earnings Conference Call May 15th
data.description: Oxford, Connecticut - RBC Bearings Incorporated (NYSE: RBC), a globally recognized manufacturer of high-precision bearings and components for industrial, aerospace, and defense sectors, shared its plan to unveil the financial outcomes of the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2026 on Friday, May 15th. The announcement will be made before the market opens. To delve deeper into the results, the company will conduct a conference call on the same day at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Leading the discussion will be Dr. Michael J. Hartnett, the Chairman of RBC Bearings.
